# Good routing example

**Context:** Detective posted that 3 incidents in the last week share
the symptom token "mask edge".

**Coordinator response:**

> Routing to cataloger: 3 incidents with shared symptom 'mask edge' may
> belong to a new hierarchy node or an existing 'preprocessing' subtree.
> Cataloger, can you propose placement by EOD tomorrow? Detective,
> please link the incident IDs in this thread for cataloger to pull.

**Why this is good:**
- Names the receiving specialist explicitly
- States the deadline
- Asks the originator to provide concrete inputs
- Doesn't itself try to do cataloger's job (no hierarchy proposals)
